customers_say: Customers find this water purifier to be the best in the market, with excellent installation and value for money, particularly noting the transparent pricing. Moreover, the machine works superbly, and customers appreciate its premium appearance and sweet-tasting water. Additionally, the service receives positive feedback, with one customer highlighting its quick response time.

reviews.body: Writing this review after using product for almost 11 months.Very Good Water Purifier!!! If you are looking for Water Purifier then go for it without any second thought. Superb product with good price. And best thing that you are not required any product service for "2 Years"!!!!!

reviews.author: Nandan Kumar
reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: The Native M1 Water Purifier has proven to be an excellent choice for clean and safe drinking water. The build quality feels sturdy and well-designed, making it a reliable addition to any home. Its purification performance is impressive, delivering fresh, great-tasting water consistently. The delivery agent did not deliver my product, I went myself and received my product. One of the standout features is its efficiency and ease of use. The system works smoothly without complications, and the design is user-friendly, even for first-time users. The installation process was quick and hassle-free,

reviews.title: Great quality and service of urban clap
reviews.body: Very good filtration and good taste of water. Compact and looks good.
